_comment: Maps each YDS-120 key code (as used in sax-fingerings.json) to the finger that operates it. Used to compute a movement-cost score between two fingerings: cost = number of distinct fingers whose on/off state changes. This ONLY drives ranking of the default fingering vs alternates; it does not affect correctness of the diagrams. CONFIRMED: 'Oct' and 'LowA' are both left thumb. Other assignments are best-effort against standard sax mechanics and should be spot-checked against the YDS-120 layout before relying on the ranking. Values are canonical finger ids.
_note: R_side and octave_palm group several codes under one physical region; if two codes in the same group toggle together the movement cost should still count them per-key OR per-finger depending on your ranking preference — decide this in js/render/sax.js and document the choice.
